headerDisplay: LinkTap wireless water timer plugin. Create an API key at https://www.link-tap.com/#!/api-for-developers.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Your API key from the LinkTap developer portal.

gatewayId.title: Gateway ID
gatewayId.description: Your gateway's first 16-digit ID (no dashes), e.g. 3F7A23FE004B1200.

pollInterval.title: Status Poll Interval (minutes)
pollInterval.description: How often to refresh battery and signal status. Minimum 5 (LinkTap API limit). Set to 0 to disable status polling. Higher values reduce network traffic.

verboseStatusLog.title: Show status updates in the main log
verboseStatusLog.description: When on, each status poll prints a battery/signal/state line to the main log. Off by default, sending these to the debug log only (keeps the main log quiet). Watering, online/offline, and alert changes are always logged regardless of this setting.

taplinkerId.title: TapLinker ID
taplinkerId.description: Your taplinker's first 16-digit ID (no dashes), e.g. 67ABCDEF004B1200.

duration.title: Watering Duration (minutes)
duration.description: How long watering runs, 1 to 1439 minutes.

autoBack.title: Auto-revert after watering
autoBack.description: Return to the previous watering mode after the duration ends.

useValve.title: Use irrigation valve
useValve.description: Expose the tap as a HomeKit irrigation valve (recommended; adds Active/InUse and live flow sensing). Set to false to use a plain on/off switch (legacy). Changing this requires re-adding the accessory in the Home app.

pauseHours.title: Schedule Pause Duration (hours)
pauseHours.description: How long the 'Pause Schedule' switch pauses scheduled watering when turned on. Range 1 to 240. Use -1 to pause indefinitely until switched off.

scheduleMode.title: Schedule Mode
scheduleMode.description: The watering plan mode set up in the LinkTap app. Used to re-activate (resume) the schedule when the Pause switch is turned off.
